assay_description: Selectivity interaction (CEREP panel (cellular receptors and 30 other enzymes)) EUB0000199c HTR2B

Binding Assay: The affinity of the compound A was evaluated in vitro on 8 cloned human serotoninergic receptors by measuring the specific binding of the ligands to the corresponding receptors according to methods adapted from Mulheron (1994), Bryant (1996), Choi (1994), Hope (1996), Mialet (2000), Rees (1994) and Shen (1993).
